npm-test.description: Runs the test suite (`npm test`) when the agent goes idle; blocks if tests fail.

npm-lint.description: Runs the linter (`npm run lint`) when the agent goes idle; blocks if lint errors are reported.

npm-build.description: Builds the project (`npm run build`) when the agent goes idle; blocks if the build fails.

npm-typecheck.description: Type-checks the project (`npm run typecheck`) when the agent goes idle; blocks if type errors are reported.
